title: Jupyter Tooling
description: Settings for the ML Workspace tooling extension

showStorageWarnings.title: Show Storage Warnings
showStorageWarnings.description: Whether to show storage usage warnings when approaching limits

showVSCode.title: Show VS Code Button
showVSCode.description: Whether to show the VS Code button in the toolbar

showVNC.title: Show VNC Button
showVNC.description: Whether to show the VNC desktop button in the toolbar
